rule_text: Setup: use every cell of an empty 3×3 board. Player 0 moves first; turns alternate, and each move places one stone on an empty cell. Player 0's first stone must be on the top row; Player 1's first stone must be on the left column. After that player's first stone, a placement is legal only if it is within one king move of a friendly component and it lies outside the pre-move bounding rectangle of at least one such component. A player wins when one friendly group connected through king-move adjacency contains at least 3 stones. If the next player has no legal placement and the previous move did not win, the previous player wins.
